requirements.requirement: Create/use Galaxy history and uploaded train/test datasets
Train Logistic Regression model in Galaxy
Use Tabular Learner with probability threshold 0.25
requirements.basis: Used Galaxy scikit-learn Generalized linear models and Model Prediction wrappers; output contains class labels at wrapper default threshold, not Tabular Learner probability-threshold output.
Original Galaxy final output is a Predicted-label table, not a metrics table.

basis: Original Galaxy output has one Predicted column with 515 predictions.
Galaxy history contains successful Cut, Remove beginning, LogisticRegression training, and Model Prediction jobs.

requirements.requirement: Galaxy-derived predictions available for all test rows

requirements.basis: Galaxy output did not include probabilities; threshold could not be changed after prediction.

basis: Computed label metrics from the preserved Galaxy prediction output and provided test Response labels for evaluation.
Ground truth is a set of train/validation/test metrics; original Galaxy output is a table of class predictions, so direct item-level metric matching is not meaningful without deriving metrics.

transformed_ground_truth_result_evaluati.tolerance: absolute delta <= 0.05 for comparable label metrics
not_compared: ROC-AUC and PR-AUC require probabilities or scores; original Galaxy output contains only predicted labels.
Train and validation metrics were not produced by the executed Galaxy workflow.
basis: Two of six comparable test label metrics matched within tolerance; threshold-dependent recall/F1/specificity/accuracy differ from the expected Tabular Learner configuration.

agent_performance_in_galaxy_score.calculation: 100 - 10*4 failures = 60; required output achieved, so no 50-point missing-output deduction.
failures: training failed because header row remained in numeric data
basis: The agent recovered by switching to Cut preprocessing, flat tool payloads, header removal, then successful training and prediction in Galaxy.

calculation_notes: Final Galaxy prediction output has 515 predictions for 515 test samples.
Ground truth was read only after Galaxy prediction output was complete and downloaded.
